title: FYI ГўВЂВ” January 2022
body_text:
FYI ГўВЂВ” January 2022
FYI ГўВ”ВЂ January 2022
The following updates were made to the Payment Solutions Manual.
Volume
CEBA Loan Repayments, Administration Fees, Settlement, and Reconciliation Part
The due date for CEBA loans has been extended from December 31, 2022, to December 31, 2023. We updated the CEBA Part to reflect that change.
Document Library
Status
AFT Clearing File Specifications ГўВЂВ“ CAD (Ontario Only)
9083
We made a correction in Chapter 3 of the AFT clearing file specifications. The file extension is ГўВЂВњ.DATГўВЂВќ (not ГўВЂВњ.NNNГўВЂВќ).
